When a receipt (image, PDF, or link) arrives via email to Eve@, Google Chat, or pre-approved WhatsApp DM (Alex/Shawn): **read `02-Projects/Expense-Tracking/Receipt-Logging-Rule.md` first**, then follow it end-to-end.

The rule covers parsing, target row selection (first row where col B / Date is blank in `Data` sheet of the "Expenses 2026" spreadsheet), column-by-column dropdown values, file renaming convention (`NNN_<orig>.ext`, 3-digit padded), and folder routing (Paid Alex / Paid Shawn / ask for business accounts).

Use Alex's account `alexander.reich@labrasseurandreich.com` for all Drive/Sheets writes — the spreadsheet + folders live in his My Drive, not Eve's.

Established 2026-04-26 in Chat space `spaces/AAQA5xkWJq0`.
